summary.en: Weaponization-first safety routing. Defined once here and required, consistently, across every operational surface. The council examines doctrines and claims at the level of propositions (attack ideas, never people or communities); once a request is classified weaponization-first — its evident purpose being to use the council to produce targeted attack, dehumanization, harassment, or incitement material against a religious or belief group or individual — it must not be run as a council debate. This refuses weaponization of the council, NOT critical, academic, historical, or comparative discussion of religions and their claims.
summary.zh-Hant: 武器化優先(weaponization-first)安全路由。於此單一來源定義一次,並要求一致地存在於每個操作面。議會在命題層次檢視教義與主張(對事不對人,絕不攻擊人或群體);一旦請求被判定為 weaponization-first——其明顯目的是利用議會產出針對某信仰群體或個人的攻擊、去人性化、騷擾,或煽動仇恨/暴力的材料——即不得當作議會辯論進行。此為拒絕把議會武器化,並非拒絕對宗教及其主張的批判、學術、歷史或比較性討論。

en: do not start the religion council
do not produce material that attacks, dehumanizes, harasses, or incites hatred or violence against a religious or belief group or individual
offer instead to examine the underlying doctrinal or ethical question at the level of propositions — attack ideas, not people or communities
this refuses weaponization of the council, not critical, academic, historical, or comparative discussion of religions and their claims
zh-Hant: 不產出針對信仰群體或個人的攻擊、去人性化、騷擾,或煽動仇恨/暴力的材料
改為在命題層次檢視背後的教義或倫理問題——對事不對人,不攻擊人或群體
此為拒絕把議會武器化,而非拒絕對宗教及其主張的批判、學術、歷史或比較性討論

canonical_rule.en: When a request has already been classified as weaponization-first, do not start the council or frame it as a debate; its evident purpose is to produce targeted attack, dehumanization, harassment, or incitement material against a religious or belief group or individual. Offer instead to examine the underlying doctrinal or ethical question at the level of propositions — attacking ideas, never people or communities. This does not refuse critical, academic, historical, or comparative discussion of religions and their claims.
canonical_rule.zh-Hant: 當請求已被判定為 weaponization-first(武器化優先)時,不啟動議會、不把它當作辯論進行;其明顯目的是產出針對某信仰群體或個人的攻擊、去人性化、騷擾,或煽動仇恨/暴力的材料。改為在命題層次檢視背後的教義或倫理問題——對事不對人,絕不攻擊人或群體。此不拒絕對宗教及其主張的批判、學術、歷史或比較性討論。

machine_guarantees: Once a request is classified as weaponization-first, it cannot enter the council pipeline.
not_claimed: The system deterministically detects every weaponization attempt from keywords.
guarantee_boundary.classification_nature: Natural-language safety classification is a distinct, fallible boundary. Critical, academic, historical, and comparative discussion of religions and their doctrines is NOT weaponization; the boundary targets only a request whose evident purpose is to produce targeting, harassment, or incitement material against a group or individual. The controller enforces only the routing invariant over a classification supplied to it; it performs no weaponization detection of its own. Runtime detection / automatic routing remains out of scope until a later architecture explicitly addresses it (would require its own ADR; see deferrals).
guarantee_boundary.enforced_by: orchestrator/debate_controller.py:guard_weaponization_routing (DebateController.start refuses a weaponization-first classification before any run dir, snapshot, or panelist job). Exposed on the public debate_start tool surface as the optional single-value enum weaponization_classification, enforced at the ControllerMcpServer._dispatch_tool boundary (approved in docs/adr/0010-weaponization-first-safety-routing.md).

deferrals: Semantic / keyword weaponization detection and any automatic runtime routing decision (would require a dedicated ADR and a separate fallibility review).
